content.content:

content.content:
I tried to look up a contact named "Alex" but no contact matched. Can you clarify which Alex you mean so I can find the file IDs they can access?

Options you can give me (any one is fine):
- Alex’s full name (e.g., Alex Martinez)
- Alex’s email address
- Alex’s company username or typical email pattern (e.g., alex@bluesparrowtech.com) — I can try that if you confirm
- Or confirm you want me to search more widely for any contact or any files that mention “Alex”

Also please confirm what you mean by “files Alex can access”:
- Files shared with Alex (in our cloud drive)
- Files owned by Alex
- Any file where Alex is mentioned in the content

Tell me which Alex and which scope, and I’ll run the appropriate searches and return the file IDs.
